title: Michelle W Bowman: When regulation reshapes markets - the migration of corporate lending
body:
Speech by Ms Michelle W Bowman, Vice Chair for Supervision of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Hoover Institution Annual Monetary Policy Conference, Stanford, California, 8 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260511h.htm

title: Christopher J Waller: Update on Federal Reserve Bank operations
body:
Speech by Mr Christopher J Waller, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Hoover Institution Annual Monetary Policy Conference, Stanford, California, 8 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260511g.htm

title: Lisa D Cook: Perspectives on tokenization and implications for the financial system
body:
Speech by Ms Lisa D Cook, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Central Bank of West African States (BCEAO) Conference on "Digital assets", Dakar, Senegal, 8 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260511f.htm
